description: Creating comprehensive provenance figure: pLDDT profile, active site schematic, and GO decision table
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np
import requests

# Re-fetch PDB data
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-O94603-F1-model_v6.pdb"
pdb_resp = requests.get(pdb_url)
lines = pdb_resp.text.split('\n')

# Parse all CA atoms with pLDDT
residues_plddt = {}
for line in lines:
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        residues_plddt[resnum] = bfactor

# Create multi-panel figure
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 18))

# === Panel 1: pLDDT profile with JmjC domain highlighted ===
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(3, 1, 1)
positions = sorted(residues_plddt.keys())
plddt_values = [residues_plddt[p] for p in positions]

ax1.fill_between(positions, plddt_values, alpha=0.3, color='steelblue')
ax1.plot(positions, plddt_values, color='steelblue', linewidth=0.5)

# Highlight JmjC domain
ax1.axvspan(243, 402, alpha=0.15, color='red', label='JmjC domain (243-402)')

# Mark key residues
key_res = {297: 'H297\n(Fe ligand 1)', 299: 'E299\n(Fe ligand 2)', 
           370: 'Y370\n(should be His!)', 314: 'K314\n(2-OG binding)'}
for pos, label in key_res.items():
    ax1.annotate(label, xy=(pos, residues_plddt[pos]), 
                xytext=(pos, residues_plddt[pos]+8),
                ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5),
                color='red')
    ax1.plot(pos, residues_plddt[pos], 'rv', markersize=8)

ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Number', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('Epe1 (O94603) AlphaFold Confidence Profile\nJmjC domain is well-predicted (mean pLDDT=92.4)', 
              fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 105)
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Confident threshold (70)')
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high confidence (90)')
ax1.legend(loc='lower left', fontsize=9)

# === Panel 2: Active site schematic ===
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(3, 1, 2)
ax2.set_xlim(-2, 12)
ax2.set_ylim(-1, 8)
ax2.set_aspect('equal')
ax2.set_title('JmjC Active Site Comparison: Epe1 vs. Active Demethylases', 
              fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Active enzyme (left side)
ax2.text(2.5, 7.5, 'Active JmjC Demethylase\n(e.g. KDM2A, Jhd1)', ha='center', 
         fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='green')

# Fe center
circle1 = plt.Circle((2.5, 4.5), 0.5, color='orange', alpha=0.8)
ax2.add_patch(circle1)
ax2.text(2.5, 4.5, 'Fe²⁺', ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)

# Ligands for active enzyme
# His (position 1)
ax2.annotate('His\n(NE2)', xy=(2.0, 5.0), xytext=(0.3, 6.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='green', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightgreen', edgecolor='green'))

# Asp/Glu (position 2)
ax2.annotate('Asp\n(OD)', xy=(3.0, 5.0), xytext=(4.7, 6.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='green', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightgreen', edgecolor='green'))

# His (position 3 - the critical one)
ax2.annotate('His ✓\n(NE2)', xy=(2.5, 3.8), xytext=(2.5, 1.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='green', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightgreen', edgecolor='green'))

# Epe1 (right side)
ax2.text(8.5, 7.5, 'Epe1 (Inactive)\nS. pombe', ha='center', 
         fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='red')

# Fe center (maybe absent)
circle2 = plt.Circle((8.5, 4.5), 0.5, color='lightgray', alpha=0.8, linestyle='--')
ax2.add_patch(circle2)
ax2.text(8.5, 4.5, 'Fe²⁺\n???', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, color='gray')

# His297 (conserved)
ax2.annotate('His297\n(NE2)', xy=(8.0, 5.0), xytext=(6.3, 6.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='green', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightgreen', edgecolor='green'))

# Glu299 (conservative change)
ax2.annotate('Glu299\n(OE)', xy=(9.0, 5.0), xytext=(10.7, 6.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#DAA520', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#DAA520', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='#DAA520'))

# Tyr370 (BROKEN!)
ax2.annotate('Tyr370 ✗\n(OH - weak!)', xy=(8.5, 3.8), xytext=(8.5, 1.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='red', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFCCCC', edgecolor='red'))

# Divider
ax2.axvline(x=5.5, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5)
ax2.axis('off')

# === Panel 3: GO Annotation Decision Table ===
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(3, 1, 3)
ax3.set_title('GO Annotation Decision Table for Epe1 (O94603)', 
              fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

table_data = [
    ['GO:0032452\nhistone demethylase', 'IBA', 'GO_Central\n(PAINT)', 'enables', 'REMOVE', 'Contradicted by NOT IDA\non child term; catalytic\ntriad incomplete'],
    ['GO:0141052\nH3 demethylase', 'IDA', 'PomBase\n(PMID:16362057)', 'NOT\nenables', 'RETAIN', 'Well-supported negative\nannotation; no in vitro\nactivity detected'],
    ['GO:0051864\nH3K36 demethylase', 'ISO', 'PomBase\n(GO_REF:0000024)', 'enables', 'REVIEW\nfor removal', 'Same vulnerability as\nIBA; orthology-based\ninference'],
    ['GO:0003712\ntranscription\ncoregulator', 'IBA', 'GO_Central', 'enables', 'RETAIN', 'Well-supported by\nmultiple studies'],
]

colors = ['#FFCCCC', '#CCFFCC', '#FFFFCC', '#CCE5FF']
col_labels = ['GO Term', 'Evidence', 'Source', 'Qualifier', 'Action', 'Rationale']

ax3.axis('off')
table = ax3.table(cellText=table_data, colLabels=col_labels,
                  loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 2.5)

# Color the Action column
for i, color in enumerate(colors):
    table[i+1, 4].set_facecolor(color)
    for j in range(6):
        table[i+1, j].set_edgecolor('gray')
        table[0, j].set_facecolor('#E0E0E0')
        table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout(pad=2)
plt.savefig('/tmp/epe1_analysis_provenance.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Comprehensive analysis figure saved.")
